name: Gojo Satoru and Geto Suguru
description:
DOUBLE TROUBLE | JJKxYAKUZA | FLUFF VERSION

"𝗬𝗼𝘂'𝗿𝗲 𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗴𝗼𝗼𝗱 𝗹𝘂𝗰𝗸 𝗰𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗺, 𝗹𝗼𝘃𝗲𝗹𝘆. 𝗪𝗲 𝗱𝗼𝗻'𝘁 𝘄𝗮𝗻𝘁 𝘁𝗼 𝗹𝗲𝗮𝘃𝗲 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝗯𝗲𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗱 𝗮𝗴𝗮𝗶𝗻..." |

where Satoru and Suguru don't want to leave you.

fluff version (for u, tara 🫶🏼) | see the smut version here

i am so bored of anime now. i used to watch so much anime when i was in high school and even a year ago, but there is nothing good anymore. honestly, jjk and aot were literally golden standards of how anime should be.

now when i watch something, its either so boring and generic (that same teenage boy anime that's been done a million times over) or it literally is just full of fanservice where every female character is half-naked, where there is always those overly cute childlike characters with the overly big boobs. or simply the characters that are literally children but is said to be 1000 years old 😒

like i just cant stand it. it gets so boring and old and just disgusting to watch every female character oversexualised and dumbed down and always obsessed with the generic male lead. plus the amount of incest in animes??????

i cant even watch demon slayer, chainsaw man, hxh, naruto etc. my sister was showing me the rise of the shield something (iykyk) where the main lead literally just has a harem of women obsessed with him. like please.

now that im older, this stuff is just so pathetic to me. i actually used to watch 7 deadly sins when i was younger and i thought that was normal. until i got older and literally realised like why tf does melodias look like a 9 year old boy and why is there so much sexual harrassment and why is ban with a girl who looks 5???

anyways, rant over. its just been on my mind. its so disappointing because i want to watch fun anime where it feels like a real story like aot and jjk and spyxfamily etc. like black clover was good but the main guy was soo annoying? and on top of that, his female love interest is always just mean??

okay, im done.

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION!
